title: abc_new: Assertion `pM->D <= Required' failed.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.53+70 (git sha1 e046e3cdb, g++ 15.1.1 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

[5171.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/20629982/5171.zip)

`yosys -s script.ys test.il`

(I tried to minimise this as much as possible, but it's still a little unwieldy)

### Expected Behavior

It runs through abc successfully.

### Actual Behavior

```
9.4.4. Executing ABC9.
Running ABC command: "<yosys-exe-dir>/yosys-abc" -s -f <abc-temp-dir>/abc.script 2>&1
ABC: ABC command line: "source <abc-temp-dir>/abc.script".
ABC:
ABC: + read_genlib ./lut_tree_cells.genlib
ABC: Entered genlib library with 75 gates from file "./lut_tree_cells.genlib".
ABC: + read_box <abc-temp-dir>/input.box
ABC: + &read <abc-temp-dir>/input.xaig
ABC: + &ps
ABC: <abc-temp-dir>/input : i/o =     12/      4  and =     415  lev =   14 (2.12)  mem = 0.01 MB  box = 79  bb = 0
ABC: + &sweep
ABC: + &dc2
ABC: + &nf
ABC: yosys-abc: src/aig/gia/giaNf.c:2052: void abc::Nf_ManComputeMappingEla(Nf_Man_t*): Assertion `pM->D <= Required' failed.
ERROR: ABC: execution of command ""/usr/local/bin/yosys-abc" -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-aS7XCy/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code 134.
```
code_blocks:

ABC: <abc-temp-dir>/input : i/o =     12/      4  and =     415  lev =   14 (2.12)  mem = 0.01 MB  box = 79  bb = 0

ERROR: ABC: execution of command ""/usr/local/bin/yosys-abc" -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-aS7XCy/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code 134.
